PATRA_CONNECT_FACEBOOK.TITLE: Connect Facebook Pages
PATRA_CONNECT_FACEBOOK.SUBTITLE: Authorize with Facebook, choose which Pages to connect, and we will create a separate inbox for each Page.
PATRA_CONNECT_FACEBOOK.CONNECTED_AS: Signed in as {name}. Select pages to add.
PATRA_CONNECT_FACEBOOK.SUCCESS: Facebook pages connected. Your new inboxes are ready.

BYOC.USING_OWN_APP: You're using your own Meta app
BYOC.REDIRECT_URI_HELP: Make sure your Meta app has this redirect URI saved under Facebook Login → Settings → Valid OAuth Redirect URIs:
BYOC.CONNECT_BUTTON: Connect Facebook pages via my Meta app
BYOC.BM_NOTICE_TITLE: Only profile-owned pages can be connected
BYOC.BM_NOTICE_BODY:
Patra can only connect Facebook pages owned directly by your profile. Pages owned by a Business Manager (a business portfolio) won't appear in the OAuth flow — this is a Facebook platform restriction we can't bypass.

To check which of your pages are owned by a Business Manager, click below. Each business shows how many pages it contains — those pages are blocked.
BYOC.BM_NOTICE_FOOTNOTE: Pages owned directly by your profile work fine — no action needed for those.

ERRORS.MISSING_APP_ID: Facebook is not configured on this server (missing app id).
ERRORS.LOGIN_CANCELLED: Facebook login was cancelled or did not complete.
ERRORS.SELECT_ONE: Select at least one page to connect.
ERRORS.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.
